message.content:
Research the COMPANY PROFILE of Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd, an Indian Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) company based in Mysore, listed on NSE/BSE (NSE: VINNY, ISIN INE0DK801011 — verify these). Use web search and fetch authoritative sources (company website vinyasit.com, screener.in, annual reports, BSE/NSE filings, credible news like Economic Times, Business Standard, moneycontrol).

Gather and report, with inline source URLs after each fact:
1. What the company does: business model, EMS service offerings (PCB assembly/SMT, box build, cable harnessing, design, testing), end-markets served (defense, aerospace, medical, industrial, automotive, telecom) and rough revenue mix by segment.
2. History & milestones: founding year, IPO/listing date and exchange, any migration from SME to main board.
3. Manufacturing facilities: locations, capacity, certifications (AS9100, ISO, defense-related approvals).
4. Key customers and concentration (e.g., Bharat Electronics / BEL, other defense PSUs, export customers). Note customer concentration risk.
5. Subsidiaries / JVs (e.g., any US subsidiary, Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc.).
6. Management & promoters: key people (MD/promoter), promoter background.
7. Order book / order pipeline if disclosed.

Be precise, flag anything uncertain or unverified, and distinguish confirmed facts from estimates. Return a structured markdown brief with source URLs. Your output is raw research data for a report, not a human-facing message.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.text:
I have comprehensive, cross-verified findings from multiple authoritative sources. Here is the research report.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd (NSE: VINYAS) — Management, Promoters & Order Book

*Note: The NSE ticker is VINYAS (the query's "VINNY" appears to be a typo). EMS company headquartered in Mysore (Mysuru), Karnataka, incorporated 2000/2001.*

## 1. Management & Promoters

- **Founder & Managing Director: Narendra Narayanan** — holds an engineering degree in Electrical & Electronics from University of Southern California; founded Vinyas in 2000; member of the Advisory Board, USC Viterbi School of Engineering. He is also described as Chairman/CEO. (https://www.vinyasit.com/executive-leadership/) (https://choiceindia.com/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-board-of-directors)
- **Director: Sumukh Narendra** (son of the founder) — B.E. in Electronics & Communication (SJCE), Master's in Embedded Systems from University of Pennsylvania; with Vinyas since 2018; serves as Executive Director. (https://www.vinyasit.com/executive-leadership/) (https://in.linkedin.com/in/sumukh-n-2507bb17)
- **Director – Operations: T.R. Srinivasan** — Mechanical Engineer; 20+ years in electronics manufacturing; with Vinyas since 2001; oversees the manufacturing facility. (https://www.vinyasit.com/executive-leadership/)
- **VP – Corporate Affairs: Deepashree Narendra** — joined 2015; co-convener of CII Women Network Forum, Mysuru. (https://www.vinyasit.com/executive-leadership/)
- **Promoter group (named):** Narendra Narayanan, Narendra Sumukh, Thirunarayanapuram Ramachari Srinivasan (T.R. Srinivasan), Pradeep Vithoba Desai, Deepa Prakash, B S Ramakrishna Mudre, Subodh M R. *(Names from aggregator/Trendlyne; not individually re-verified against an exchange filing — flag as needing confirmation.)* (https://trendlyne.com/equity/share-holding/1715908/VINYAS/latest/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd/)

**Promoter holding (confirmed, latest):**
- **29.40% as of March 2026** (per Screener.in's latest shareholding pattern). Notably, **0.00% pledged**. Screener flags this holding as "low." (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- Full pattern (March 2026, per Screener): Promoters 29.40%, FIIs 0.49%, DIIs 6.53%, Public 63.59%; ~1,673 shareholders. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- *Estimate/discrepancy flag:* An earlier aggregator cited Promoters 29.39%, Institutions 5.00%, Public 65.61%, and a SimplyWall.st figure of "insiders own 58%" — these are dated or methodology-different snapshots. The Screener March 2026 figures above are the most current/authoritative. (https://trendlyne.com/equity/share-holding/1715908/VINYAS/latest/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd/) (https://simplywall.st/stocks/in/tech/nse-vinyas/vinyas-innovative-technologies-shares/news/)

## 2. Order Book / Pipeline (Confirmed via FY2026 earnings call, ~May/June 2026)

- **Order book: ₹1,309 crore as of March 31, 2026.** (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642) (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- **Growth:** up from **₹1,062 crore as of September 30, 2025** — clear sequential growth through FY26. (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-q2-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4305582)
- **Order inflows FY26: ~₹960 crore.** (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642)
- **FY27 guidance:** management expects inflows "25%–30% more than last year"; order book gives visibility supporting 30%–35% growth; EBITDA margin guided to 11%–12% (vs 12.5% in FY26). (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642)
- **Execution timeline:** 18–24 months for the current order book. (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642)
- **Sector mix:** **Defence ~85%–90% of order book**; remainder aerospace, industrial, medical. (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642)
- **Supporting financials (FY26):** Revenue ~₹514–518 crore; PAT ~₹30.87 crore; exports ~50% of sales; capacity utilization only ~35–40% (room to grow as ~₹30 crore capex comes online). (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/) (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642)

## 3. Recent Large Orders & Contract Wins

- **₹60.84 crore PCBA orders (announced May 15, 2026)** — split: domestic ₹32.12 crore (execution 6–12 months) + international ₹28.72 crore (execution 12–18 months). (https://www.businessupturn.com/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-secures-orders-worth-%E2%82%B960-84-crore/) (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-secures-purchase-orders-worth-60-84-crores-from-domestic-and-international-customers/40427836)
- **₹53.74 crore PCBA orders (announced ~Feb 2025)** — domestic and international customers, 24-month execution. (https://www.businessupturn.com/business/smes/vinyas-innovative-technologies-secures-rs-53-74-crore-order-from-domestic-and-international-clients/)
- **₹49.42 crore PCBA order** — 6–12 month delivery timeline (separate disclosure). (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/orders-deals/vinyas-innovative-technologies-secures-49-42-crore-pcba-order-with-6-12-month-delivery-timeline/31057425)
- **Orders from Ministry of Defence & others** reported (date not pinned). (https://tradebrains.in/vinyas-innovative-and-2-other-stocks-in-focus-after-securing-orders-from-min-of-defence-others/)

## Strategic Developments (relevant context)

- **Defence JV with an Israel-based defence technology company (announced May 26, 2026):** Vinyas holds **26%** (₹2.6 crore investment), Israeli partner 74%; domestic entity covering manufacturing, assembly, system integration, maintenance and lifecycle support in defence/aerospace; subject to regulatory approvals. (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-forms-jv-in-defence-sector/41317450) (https://www.businessupturn.com/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-enters-strategic-joint-venture-with-israel-based-company/)
- **Wholly-owned US subsidiary** incorporated to support overseas expansion. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/) (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-incorporates-wholly-owned-us-subsidiary/41708660)

## Confidence Notes
- **High confidence (multi-source / primary):** MD/founder identity, order book ₹1,309 cr (Mar 2026), promoter holding 29.40%, the ₹60.84 cr order, defence JV terms.
- **Medium / flag for verification:** the full named promoter list (single aggregator source); exact revenue (₹514 vs ₹518 cr — rounding across sources); older shareholding snapshots (29.39%, "58% insiders") which conflict with current Screener figures and appear dated.
- Aggregator sources (scanx, businessupturn, trendlyne) restate exchange filings; for legal certainty the underlying NSE/BSE corporate announcements and the FY26 annual report would be the primary documents to confirm.

I have enough to compile a well-sourced answer.

## Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd — Manufacturing Facilities & Certifications

### Manufacturing Facilities (Locations & Number)
- **CONFIRMED — Primary manufacturing facility in Mysuru (Mysore), Karnataka.** Address: KIADB Plot No. 19, Survey No. 26 & 273P, 3rd Phase, Koorgalli Industrial Area, Koorgalli, Mysuru-570018 (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- **CONFIRMED — Main facility was inaugurated in 2014; company was originally established in 2001 with semi-auto SMT lines** (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- **CONFIRMED — A dedicated export unit operates under the Electronic Hardware Technology Park (EHTP) scheme** (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- **CONFIRMED — A dedicated Class III facility** (high-reliability/defense-grade assembly) is offered as a capability (https://www.indiamart.com/vinyasinnovative-technologies/)
- **UNVERIFIED — Exact number of separate "plants."** Company materials describe one primary world-class facility plus the EHTP export unit and a Class III facility, but do not explicitly state a count of distinct plants. A Bengaluru address appears on some directory listings (https://www.indiamart.com/vinyasinnovative-technologies/aboutus.html); the operational manufacturing site is Mysuru. No clearly confirmed second standalone plant found in searched sources.

### Capacity (Production area, SMT lines, etc.)
- **CONFIRMED — Over 1,50,000 sq. ft. (~150,000 sq ft) of production area** (https://www.vinyasit.com/ and https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- **CONFIRMED — PCB assembly lines supporting both SMT and PTH/THT operations; handles multi-layer, flexible and rigid PCBs**, with low/medium/high mix and volume production (https://www.vinyasit.com/ems-capabilities/)
- **CONFIRMED — Additional infrastructure: dedicated NPI/prototype production line, box-build & system integration, and in-house ESS & HASS testing** (https://www.vinyasit.com/ems-capabilities/)
- **CONFIRMED (historical capacity data point) — Manufactured 10,000 energy meters per day (2012)**, cited as evidence of high-volume capability (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- **NOT DISCLOSED / UNVERIFIED — Exact number of SMT lines and THT lines.** Company sites describe "high-speed SMT lines" but do not give a numeric count. Post-IPO (late 2023) the company reportedly invested in new SMT lines, but specific counts were not found in searched sources (https://www.vinyasit.com/ems-capabilities/)

### Certifications & Approvals
- **CONFIRMED — ISO 9001:2015** (Quality Management) (https://www.vinyasit.com/quality/)
- **CONFIRMED — AS 9100-D** (Aerospace & Defence QMS) (https://www.vinyasit.com/quality/ and https://www.vinyasit.com/aerospace-defence/)
- **CONFIRMED — ISO 13485:2016** (Medical Devices QMS) (https://www.vinyasit.com/quality/)
- **CONFIRMED — NADCAP** (National Aerospace and Defense Contractors Accreditation Program) listed on the Quality page (https://www.vinyasit.com/quality/)
- **CONFIRMED — Defence Industry License** (https://www.vinyasit.com/quality/ and https://www.vinyasit.com/aerospace-defence/)
- **CONFIRMED — IPC/J-STD process standards followed:** IPC-J-STD-003B, IPC-CM-770, IPC-HDBK-001, J-STD-001E, IPC-A-610D (Classes 1/2/3), IPC-WHMA-A-620A (Classes 1/2/3) (https://www.vinyasit.com/quality/)
- **REPORTED (third-party, not on company Quality page) — IATF certification** mentioned in a trade/news profile; treat as secondary until confirmed on company docs (https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/what-is)
- **NOT FOUND / UNVERIFIED — NABL accreditation.** No NABL accreditation was found on the company's Quality page or in searched sources. Cannot confirm.
- **NOT FOUND / UNVERIFIED — ISO 14001 (environmental).** No ISO 14001 certification mentioned on the company Quality page or other sources searched. Cannot confirm.
- **CONFIRMED (general) — Positioned as a strategic supplier to Indian defense PSUs / aerospace & defense supply chains**, with offset-procedure compliance; however, **specific named defense-PSU approvals were not found** in the searched sources (https://www.vinyasit.com/aerospace-defence/ and https://www.indiamanufacturingreview.com/manufacturing/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-manufacturing-highquality-electronics-for-strategic-sectors-nwid-9139.html)

### Notes on sourcing
- Most facility/capacity facts come from the company's own site (vinyasit.com), which is authoritative for self-disclosure but not independently audited.
- The FY2024-25 NSE SME annual report (https://archives.nseindia.com/annual_reports/SME_AR_28246_VINYAS_2024_2025_A_13318486_03092025110111.pdf) likely contains audited facility/capacity and any new-unit details, but it exceeded the fetch size limit and could not be parsed here — recommended for verifying exact SMT line counts, ISO 14001/NABL status, and any second plant.
- Directory listings (IndiaMART/Justdial) show inconsistent data (e.g., a Bengaluru address, low employee counts) and should be treated as low-reliability.

**Bottom line:** Confirmed are a single ~150,000 sq ft Mysuru manufacturing facility (inaugurated 2014) with an EHTP export unit and a dedicated Class III line; certifications confirmed are ISO 9001:2015, AS 9100-D, ISO 13485:2016, NADCAP, and a Defence Industry License (plus IPC/J-STD process compliance). NABL and ISO 14001 could not be verified; IATF is reported only by a third party; exact SMT line counts are not publicly disclosed in the sources reviewed.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd — Research Findings

## Ticker & ISIN Verification
- **NSE ticker is VINYAS, NOT "VINNY" as claimed.** Multiple authoritative sources (NSE, screener.in, Groww, Trendlyne, TradingView) all use the symbol **VINYAS**. The claimed "VINNY" is incorrect. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/ ; https://www.nseindia.com/get-quotes/equity?symbol=VINYAS)
  - Note: Some Investing.com/CNBC feeds display vendor symbols like "VINV" / "VINYAS-IN", but the actual NSE trading symbol is **VINYAS**. (https://www.investing.com/equities/vinyas-innovative-tech)
- **Listing venue:** This is an **NSE SME (NSE Emerge)** listing, not the main board. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- **BSE code:** 88617 per Indmoney. (https://www.indmoney.com/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-share-price)
- **ISIN INE0DK801011: UNVERIFIED.** None of the authoritative pages I could fetch (screener, Groww, Trendlyne, NSE, Indmoney) surfaced the ISIN text, so I could neither confirm nor refute the claimed value. Treat as unverified — should be checked directly on the NSE/BSE security master or a depository (NSDL/CDSL) lookup. (Searched: https://www.nseindia.com/get-quotes/equity?symbol=VINYAS)

## What the Company Does (Business Model) — Confirmed
- Indian **Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) + ODM** provider headquartered in **Mysore**, incorporated 27 April 2001; converted to a public limited company on 14 June 2023. (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; search via https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- Strategy: **high-mix, low-to-medium volume, high-complexity, build-to-specification** production — focused on complex PCB assemblies and box-builds, which gives higher entry barriers and more stable margins. (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; https://www.indiamanufacturingreview.com/manufacturing/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-manufacturing-highquality-electronics-for-strategic-sectors-nwid-9139.html)
- Positioned as a preferred **IOP (Indian Offset Partner)** for foreign defence OEMs. (https://www.vinyasit.com/aerospace-defence/)
- Certifications: **ISO 9001:2015, AS9100D (aerospace), ISO 13485:2016 (medical).** (search via https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)
- Incorporated a wholly owned US subsidiary, **Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc.**, to expand international reach. (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-incorporates-wholly-owned-us-subsidiary/41708660)

### EMS Service Offerings — Confirmed (vinyasit.com)
- **PCB Assembly & SMT** — surface-mount + through-hole, per IPC standards
- **Design & Engineering** — concept through detailed design / DFM
- **Prototype & NPI** (new product introduction)
- **Box Build & Product Integration / system assembly**
- **Cable & Wire Harnessing** — per IPC-WHMA-A-620A (Class 1, 2 & 3)
- **Testing & Inspection** — advanced test solutions
- **Aftermarket support** — warranty, repair/rework, logistics, PIM
(All: https://www.vinyasit.com/)

## End-Markets Served — Confirmed
Six primary industries: **Aerospace & Defence, Medical, Automotive, Industrial, Telecommunication, Consumer.** (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- Aerospace & Defence: navigation/communication, surveillance
- Medical: patient monitoring, ventilators, dialysis, diagnostic/imaging
- Automotive, Industrial (automation/power mgmt), Telecom (routers/network), Consumer (smart home)

### Revenue / Order Mix by Segment — Mixed confidence
- **Defence & Aerospace dominates.** Management states the **defense sector is ~85–90% of the order book**; in **H1 FY2026, Defence & Aerospace was ~78.5% of revenue.** (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html ; search via https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/what-is)
- **Exports ~50% of revenue**, primarily Europe and US, with a stated 50/50 domestic-export split going forward. (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- Note: A precise FY-end segment % split (defense vs. medical vs. others) was **not disclosed** in sources I reached — the above are management commentary / order-book figures, not an audited segment table. Flag as estimate.

## Recent Financials
**FY2026 (full year ended 31 March 2026) — most recent, from earnings call:**
- Revenue: **~₹518 crore** (one fetch showed ₹514 cr; ~₹518 cr from the FY26 earnings call). (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- Net profit (PAT): **₹30.87 crore** (up ~59% YoY). (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-reports-fy26-net-profit-of-3-086-83-lakh/41584718 ; https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- EBITDA: **₹64.77 cr (12.5% margin)**; Order inflows **₹960 cr** in FY26; Order book **₹1,309 cr** as of 31 Mar 2026; FY27 order growth guided **+25–30%**. (https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)

**FY2025 (year ended 31 March 2025) — Confirmed:**
- Revenue: **₹400.15 crore** (up 24.74% from ₹320.78 cr in FY2024). (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/ ; https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)
- Net profit: **₹19.42 crore** (up 26.56% YoY). (https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)
- FY2024 revenue baseline: **₹320.78 crore.** (search via https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)

**Market cap — value varies by date (stock is volatile):**
- screener.in: **~₹1,768 cr**; Groww: **~₹1,841 cr**; an older 5paisa-cited figure: **~₹1,393 cr (as of 27 May 2026)**. Share price ~₹1,400–1,463 in mid-June 2026. Best stated as **roughly ₹1,400–1,840 crore** depending on date. (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/ ; https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)

## Summary of flags
- **Ticker "VINNY" is WRONG → correct symbol is VINYAS** (NSE SME/Emerge board).
- **ISIN INE0DK801011 is UNVERIFIED** — not surfaced by any authoritative source I fetched; verify via NSE/NSDL security master.
- Segment revenue percentages are management/order-book commentary, not an audited segment table — treat as estimates.
- FY2026 revenue figure shows minor variance across sources (~₹514–518 cr); FY2026 net profit ₹30.87 cr is consistent.

The migration to main board is confirmed by multiple data providers now classifying it as NSE main board, though I could not pin down the exact migration date. Here are my findings.

## Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd (NSE: VINYAS) — History, Milestones & Listing

### Founding / Incorporation
- **Incorporated in 2001** in Mysore (Mysuru), Karnataka. CONFIRMED across multiple sources ([screener.in](https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/); company site [vinyasit.com](https://www.vinyasit.com/company-overview/)).
- Founded by **N. Narendra (Narendra Narayanan)** with a team of technocrats; the vision/founding is dated to 2000 with official incorporation in 2001 ([vinyasit.com company-overview, via fetch](https://www.vinyasit.com/company-overview/)).
- Business: Indian **Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS)** provider — design, engineering, PCB assembly, box-build, test solutions — serving aerospace, defense, medical and industrial OEMs/ODMs ([screener.in](https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)).

### IPO / Listing
- **SME IPO on NSE Emerge (NSE SME platform).** This was an SME-segment listing, not a main-board IPO. CONFIRMED ([ipowatch.in](https://ipowatch.in/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ipo-date-review-price-allotment-details/); [ipopremium.in](https://www.ipopremium.in/view/ipo/282)).
- **IPO open:** September 27, 2023 — **close:** October 3, 2023 ([ipowatch.in](https://ipowatch.in/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ipo-date-review-price-allotment-details/)).
- **Listing date:** **October 6, 2023** on NSE SME. CONFIRMED by majority of sources. (One source cited an earlier tentative date of 11 October 2023; this appears to be a pre-listing estimate and is superseded.) ([ipowatch.in](https://ipowatch.in/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ipo-date-review-price-allotment-details/); [investorgain.com](https://www.investorgain.com/ipo/vinyas-innovative-technologies-sme-ipo/651/)).
- **Issue price band:** ₹162–₹165 per share; **issue size ~₹54.66 crore** (3,312,800 equity shares, face value ₹10). CONFIRMED ([ipowatch.in](https://ipowatch.in/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ipo-date-review-price-allotment-details/)). (Some sources round the issue size to ~₹51.92 Cr — minor discrepancy, likely fresh-issue vs total.)
- **Listing pop:** listed at ₹330 vs ₹165 issue price — ~100% listing gain ([ipopremium.in](https://www.ipopremium.in/view/ipo/282)).

### Migration from SME platform to NSE Main Board
- **The stock appears to have MIGRATED from NSE Emerge (SME) to the NSE Main Board.** This is strongly indicated by multiple market-data providers now classifying it as **"NSE Main Board"** rather than SME — Groww ([groww.in](https://groww.in/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd)), Investing.com ([in.investing.com](https://in.investing.com/equities/vinyas-innovative-tech)), and ValueResearch ([valueresearchonline.com](https://www.valueresearchonline.com/stocks/325037/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd/)), plus the plain NSE get-quote URL `/get-quote/equity/VINYAS` (SME symbols carry a "-SM"/"SM" suffix) ([nseindia.com](https://www.nseindia.com/get-quote/equity/VINYAS/Vinyas-Innovative-Technologies-Limited)).
- ⚠️ **UNVERIFIED — exact migration date.** I could not find an authoritative circular or news item stating the precise effective date of the main-board migration. NSE's revised SME→Main Board migration criteria took effect **May 1, 2025** ([business-standard.com](https://www.business-standard.com/markets/news/nse-raises-eligibility-criteria-for-direct-sme-migration-to-mainboard-125042401224_1.html)); migration would have occurred around or after that, but treat the date as unconfirmed pending an NSE circular / company filing.
- ⚠️ **Ticker note:** NSE symbol is **VINYAS** (ISIN INE0OLS01010). Some providers display a code **"VINV"** (Investing.com) — this is a provider-specific symbol, not the NSE ticker.

### Other historical milestones (from company site; treat as company-stated, semi-verified)
- **2011–2012:** Received "The Best Employer" award from the National Trust, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India ([vinyasit.com](https://www.vinyasit.com/company-overview/)).
- **2015:** Deepashree Narendra joined as VP – Corporate Affairs; **2018:** Sumukh Narendra joined as Executive Director ([vinyasit.com](https://www.vinyasit.com/company-overview/)).
- **Certifications:** ISO 9001:2015, **AS9100-D** (aerospace), ISO 13485:2016 (medical) — enabling entry into aerospace/defense and medical supply chains ([screener.in](https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)).
- **FY2025 financials (reported):** revenue ~₹400.15 crore (+24.74% YoY); net profit ~₹19.42 crore (+26.56% YoY). Reported figures, single-source — verify against filings ([bitget.com profile](https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/what-is)).
- **Market cap** ~₹1,841 crore (small-cap), as of mid-2026 ([valueresearchonline.com](https://www.valueresearchonline.com/stocks/325037/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd/)).

### Data-quality notes
- chittorgarh.com, investorgain.com, ipoplatform.com, and ipocentral.in returned HTTP 403 and could not be fetched directly; their key figures were corroborated via search snippets and other fetchable sources (ipowatch, ipopremium, groww, screener, valueresearch).
- The two open items to confirm against primary filings (NSE circular / company investor-relations / RHP-DRHP): (1) **exact main-board migration date**, and (2) reconciling the **₹51.92 Cr vs ₹54.66 Cr** issue-size figures.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd — Customers, Concentration & Subsidiaries/JVs

## Key Customers

- **Bharat Electronics Ltd (BEL) is a confirmed major customer.** Vinyas received a ₹43.5 crore purchase order from BEL's Chennai units, and had earlier received a ₹26.25 crore order from BEL's Bengaluru and Chennai units. BEL is described as the order source in financial-media coverage. (https://tradebrains.in/features/microcap-stock-jumps-8-after-securing-an-order-worth-43-5-cr-from-bel/)
- **Customer base is concentrated in Defence & Aerospace,** working with Indian defence companies/PSUs and global aerospace-defence OEMs. Defence contributes roughly **85%–90% of the order book**; in H1 FY26 Defence & Aerospace was **78.5% of revenue**, and in FY23 it was **82.3%** (₹19,303.94 lakh of total). (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html) (https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/what-is)
- **Export/overseas customers are significant — about 50% of FY26 revenue,** primarily global OEMs/ODMs in **Europe and the US** across aerospace, medical, industrial and telecom. Specific overseas customer names were not disclosed in the sources reviewed. (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- Order book is large and defence-led: reported around **₹1,062 crore** (with ₹1,488 crore cited at an earlier date), executable over 3–4 years. (https://tradebrains.in/features/semiconductor-stock-jumps-4-after-receiving-an-order-worth-54-cr-for-pcbs/ — via search summary)

## Customer Concentration / Concentration Risk

- **Confirmed: heavy single-customer reliance.** The IPO prospectus (RHP) risk factors state the company's "revenue is significantly reliant on a single customer, which represents a substantial portion of its income." (https://www.finowings.com/IPO/vinyas-innovative-technologies-limited-ipo)
- **Sector concentration is also high:** Defence + Industrial combined exceed ~90% of revenue, exposing the company to government procurement cycles and the risk of losing a major contract. (https://www.moneyworks4me.com/indianstocks/small-cap/capital-goods-industrial-consumables/electronics-components/vinyas-innova-techno/company-info)
- **UNVERIFIED — the exact top-customer % was not found, nor was it confirmed that BEL specifically is the single dominant customer.** BEL is clearly a large/repeat customer, but I could not confirm from authoritative disclosures that BEL is *the* single customer driving the prospectus's concentration warning. The exact top-1/top-5 revenue percentages are in the RHP/annual report (the NSE RHP PDF and H1 FY26 investor presentation could not be parsed — PDF was binary/compressed and the NSE link repeatedly timed out). This figure should be verified directly in those filings.
  - Note: A search result citing an SEC EDGAR filing ("Customer A 15%, Customer B 13%") refers to an unrelated US company and does **not** apply to Vinyas — disregard it.

## Subsidiaries / Joint Ventures

- **US subsidiary CONFIRMED: "Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc."** — a 100% wholly-owned subsidiary incorporated in the **United States**, announced **29 May 2026**. Purpose: expand US-market presence, strengthen relationships with global customers, coordinate supply chains and support business development in EMS / Defence / Aerospace. Share-capital subscription was expected to complete by **May 2026**; business activities had **not yet commenced** at announcement. Treated as a related-party transaction. (https://www.businessupturn.com/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-establishes-wholly-owned-subsidiary-in-the-usa) (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- **Israel defence JV CONFIRMED (domestic JV in India):** Vinyas entered a JV with an **Israel-based defence-technology company**, taking a **26% stake** with an investment of **₹2.6 crore** (shares at ₹10 face value); the Israeli partner holds the remaining 74%. Scope: manufacturing, assembly, system integration, maintenance, lifecycle support and related defence/aerospace activities in India, under a JV & Shareholders' Agreement. (https://www.businessupturn.com/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-enters-strategic-joint-venture-with-israel-based-company/) (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
  - **UNVERIFIED:** the Israeli partner's name and the JV entity's name were not disclosed in the sources reviewed.
- **Related supply-chain note:** ~10–15% of Vinyas's supplies are sourced from Israel, a stated geopolitical exposure. (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)

## Company Snapshot (context)
- Mysore (Koorgalli)-based EMS provider, incorporated 2001, AS9100-D certified; NSE Emerge SME IPO Sept–Oct 2023; FY26 revenue ₹514.32 cr (+29.45%), net profit ₹30.87 cr (+58.92%). (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html) (https://www.vinyasit.com/company-overview/)

## Items to verify directly in primary filings
1. Exact top-customer revenue % and whether BEL is the single dominant customer — in the RHP (https://archives.nseindia.com/emerge/corporates/content/Vinyas_RHP.pdf) and latest annual report.
2. Names of overseas/export customers.
3. Name of the Israeli JV partner and JV entity.

The RHP PDF and H1 FY26 investor presentation (https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/VINYAS_06112025180228_Investor_Presentation_H1_202526.pdf) are the authoritative sources for items 1–3 but could not be machine-parsed in this session (binary PDF / repeated timeouts).

**Company Overview:**
Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited is an India-based integrated electronic manufacturing services provider that offers design, engineering and electronics manufacturing services to global original equipment manufacturers and original design manufacturers in the electronics industry.

**Stock Information:**
- The stock symbol is NSE: VINYAS on the NSE, and the ISIN is INE0OLS01010.
- The company is listed and trades on the NSE stock exchange.

**Services:**
The company provides electronic manufacturing services as build to print (B2P) and build to specification (B2S) services, where B2P involves the client providing the design and the company providing agile and flexible manufacturing services, while B2S involves utilizing design capabilities to design products based on client specifications and manufacturing them.

Solutions primarily comprise printed circuit board (PCBA) assembly and box builds used in safety critical systems such as cockpits, inflight systems, landing systems, and medical diagnostic equipment.

The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Mysore, India.

content.text:
The verification is conclusive. The actual ISIN is **INE0OLS01010** (confirmed by NSE, MarketScreener, Upstox), not the claimed INE0DK801011. The ticker is **VINYAS**, not VINNY, and it remains an **NSE SME / Emerge** listing (no main-board migration confirmed; the "main board" classifications from some aggregators are contradicted by NSE and Screener). I have everything needed to synthesize the brief.

---

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd — Company Profile (Research Brief)

*Raw research data compiled 2026-06-15. Confirmed facts vs. estimates flagged throughout. Inline source URLs after each fact.*

## 0. Identifier Verification (corrections to the brief's premises)

- **Ticker: the claimed "VINNY" is WRONG.** The NSE trading symbol is **VINYAS**. (https://www.nseindia.com/get-quote/equity/VINYAS/Vinyas-Innovative-Technologies-Limited ; https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/). Some vendor feeds (Investing.com) display "VINV" — provider-specific, not the NSE ticker.
- **ISIN: the claimed "INE0DK801011" is WRONG.** The correct ISIN is **INE0OLS01010**, confirmed by NSE, MarketScreener and Upstox. (https://www.nseindia.com/get-quote/equity/VINYAS/Vinyas-Innovative-Technologies-Limited ; https://www.marketscreener.com/quote/stock/VINYAS-INNOVATIVE-TECHNOL-159963020/company/ ; https://upstox.com/stocks/vinyas-innovative-tech-l-share-price/INE0OLS01010/)
- **BSE code: 88617** (per Indmoney; not independently re-verified). (https://www.indmoney.com/stocks/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-share-price)
- **Listing board: NSE SME / NSE Emerge — NOT main board (CONFIRMED).** Screener labels it "NSE - SME: VINYAS … Part of Nifty SME Emerge." (https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/). **Flag:** Some aggregators (Groww, ValueResearch, Investing.com) classify it as "NSE Main Board," but NSE and Screener still show it as SME — no authoritative circular confirming a main-board migration was found. **Treat main-board migration as UNVERIFIED / likely not yet occurred.**

## 1. Business Model & Service Offerings

- Indian **Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) + ODM** provider headquartered in **Mysore (Mysuru)**, Karnataka. (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- Strategy: **high-mix, low-to-medium volume, high-complexity, build-to-specification** production of complex PCB assemblies and box-builds (higher entry barriers / more stable margins). (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; https://www.indiamanufacturingreview.com/manufacturing/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-manufacturing-highquality-electronics-for-strategic-sectors-nwid-9139.html)
- Two service models: **Build-to-Print (B2P)** — client supplies design; and **Build-to-Specification (B2S)** — Vinyas designs to client specs. (https://www.marketscreener.com/quote/stock/VINYAS-INNOVATIVE-TECHNOL-159963020/company/)
- Positioned as a preferred **Indian Offset Partner (IOP)** for foreign defence OEMs. (https://www.vinyasit.com/aerospace-defence/)

**EMS service offerings (CONFIRMED, vinyasit.com):** PCB assembly & SMT (surface-mount + through-hole, per IPC); design & engineering / DFM; prototype & NPI; box build & product/system integration; cable & wire harnessing (per IPC-WHMA-A-620A Class 1/2/3); testing & inspection (incl. in-house ESS & HASS); aftermarket support (warranty, repair/rework, logistics). (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; https://www.vinyasit.com/ems-capabilities/)

**End-markets (CONFIRMED):** six industries — Aerospace & Defence, Medical, Automotive, Industrial, Telecommunication, Consumer. (https://www.vinyasit.com/)

**Revenue mix by segment (management commentary, NOT an audited segment table — treat as estimate):**
- Defence & Aerospace dominant: **~85–90% of order book**; **~78.5% of H1 FY26 revenue**; was **82.3% in FY23**. (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html ; https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/what-is)
- **Exports ~50% of revenue** (FY26), primarily Europe and US. (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)

## 2. History & Milestones

- **Incorporated 2001** in Mysore (founder vision dated to 2000); founded by **Narendra Narayanan**. Converted to public limited company 14 June 2023. (https://www.vinyasit.com/company-overview/ ; https://www.screener.in/company/VINYAS/)
- Primary manufacturing facility **inaugurated 2014**. (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- **SME IPO on NSE Emerge:** open 27 Sep 2023, close 3 Oct 2023, **listed 6 Oct 2023**. Price band ₹162–₹165; issue size ~₹54.66 cr (some sources ~₹51.92 cr); listed ~₹330 (~100% pop). (https://ipowatch.in/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ipo-date-review-price-allotment-details/ ; https://www.ipopremium.in/view/ipo/282 ; https://www.investorgain.com/ipo/vinyas-innovative-technologies-sme-ipo/651/)
- **SME-to-main-board migration: UNVERIFIED** (see §0). Still shown as NSE SME by NSE/Screener.

## 3. Manufacturing Facilities & Certifications

- **One primary facility, Mysuru** (KIADB, Koorgalli Industrial Area, 3rd Phase, Mysuru-570018), **>150,000 sq ft** production area; inaugurated 2014. (https://www.vinyasit.com/)
- Plus a **dedicated EHTP export unit** (Electronic Hardware Technology Park scheme) and a **dedicated Class III (high-reliability/defence-grade) line**. (https://www.vinyasit.com/ ; https://www.indiamart.com/vinyasinnovative-technologies/)
- SMT + PTH/THT lines; multi-layer, flexible & rigid PCBs; dedicated NPI/prototype line; box-build/integration. **Exact SMT line counts NOT publicly disclosed.** (https://www.vinyasit.com/ems-capabilities/)
- Low utilization headroom: **~35–40% capacity utilization** (FY26), with ~₹30 cr capex coming online. (https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642)

**Certifications (CONFIRMED, vinyasit.com/quality):** ISO 9001:2015; **AS9100-D** (aerospace/defence); ISO 13485:2016 (medical); **NADCAP**; **Defence Industry License**; IPC/J-STD process compliance (J-STD-001E, IPC-A-610D, IPC-WHMA-A-620A, etc.). (https://www.vinyasit.com/quality/ ; https://www.vinyasit.com/aerospace-defence/)
- **NABL and ISO 14001: NOT FOUND / UNVERIFIED.** **IATF**: reported only by a third-party profile, not on company quality page — unverified. (https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/what-is)

## 4. Key Customers & Concentration

- **Bharat Electronics Ltd (BEL): CONFIRMED major/repeat customer** — orders incl. ₹43.5 cr (Chennai units) and an earlier ₹26.25 cr (Bengaluru + Chennai). (https://tradebrains.in/features/microcap-stock-jumps-8-after-securing-an-order-worth-43-5-cr-from-bel/)
- Customer base concentrated in defence/aerospace (Indian PSUs + global OEMs). **Exports ~50% of FY26 revenue**, mainly Europe & US; specific overseas customer names **not disclosed**. (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
- **Concentration risk CONFIRMED:** the IPO RHP risk factors state revenue is "significantly reliant on a single customer." (https://www.finowings.com/IPO/vinyas-innovative-technologies-limited-ipo). Sector concentration also high (defence + industrial >90%). (https://www.moneyworks4me.com/indianstocks/small-cap/capital-goods-industrial-consumables/electronics-components/vinyas-innova-techno/company-info)
- **UNVERIFIED:** exact top-customer revenue %, and whether BEL specifically is *the* single dominant customer cited in the RHP. Verify in RHP / annual report.

## 5. Subsidiaries & JVs

- **US subsidiary CONFIRMED: "Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc." — 100% wholly-owned, incorporated in the USA**, announced ~29 May 2026; purpose: expand US presence / business development in EMS/defence/aerospace; not yet operational at announcement. (https://www.businessupturn.com/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-establishes-wholly-owned-subsidiary-in-the-usa ; https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-incorporates-wholly-owned-us-subsidiary/41708660)
- **Defence JV (in India) with an Israel-based defence-tech company CONFIRMED:** Vinyas holds **26%** (₹2.6 cr investment), Israeli partner 74%; covers manufacturing, assembly, system integration, maintenance and lifecycle support; announced ~26 May 2026. **Israeli partner name & JV entity name NOT disclosed.** (https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-forms-jv-in-defence-sector/41317450 ; https://www.businessupturn.com/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-enters-strategic-joint-venture-with-israel-based-company/)
- Related exposure: ~10–15% of supplies sourced from Israel. (https://ca.finance.yahoo.com/news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nse-010216958.html)
